{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/tags/0.2.0/assets/cubyz/blocks/textures/aerosoil.png
|block_health=6.5
|tool=[[Shover]]
|rotation=stairs
}}

Aerosoil is a soil that hosts sky grass. It is only found on sky islands.

== Obtaining ==
Aerosoil can be found only on sky islands.
Breaking sky grass will drop aerosoil blocks.

== Usage ==
{{Stub|section}}

== History ==

* [[0.2.0]] - Added to the game

== Trivia ==
{{Stub|section}}

[[Category:Blocks]]
[[Category:Soil]]
